zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon de Marbury於1234年出生在英國賀福爾維奧布利時，他的父親Randal de Marbury24歲，母親Rebecca24歲。他於1259年與Idonea de Walton在英國賀福爾維奧布利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon de Marbury于1234年出生在英国賀福爾維奧布利时，他的父亲Randal de Marbury24岁，母亲Rebecca24岁。他于1259年与Idonea de Walton在英国賀福爾維奧布利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Marbury in Great Budworth, or, perhaps, from Marbury cum Quoisley (both in Cheshire). Both placenames derive from Old English mere ‘pool, lake’ + burh ‘fortress’ (dative byrig), ‘stronghold by the lake’.

variant of Marbrow, itself a variant of Marlborough, a habitational name from Marlborough (Wiltshire), which probably derives from an Old English personal name Mǣrla + Old English beorg ‘hill, mound’.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon de Marbury was born in 1234, in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, his father, Randal de Marbury, was 24 and his mother, Rebecca, was 24. He married Idonea de Walton in 1259, in Weobley, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon de Marbury est né en 1234, à Weobley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Randal de Marbury, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Rebecca, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Idonea de Walton en 1259, à Weobley, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon de Marbury 1234 in Weobley, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Randal de Marbury 24 und seine Mutter Rebecca 24. Er hat 1259 in Weobley, Herefordshire, England Idonea de Walton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Marbury è nato il nel 1234 nel Weobley, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Randal de Marbury, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Rebecca, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Idonea de Walton nel 1259, nel Weobley, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli.

ko.lifeSummary: Simon de Marbury(이)가 1234년 영국 허퍼드실르 w오블리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Randal de Marbury(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Rebecca(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1259년 영국 허퍼드실르 w오블리에서 Idonea de Walton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Marbury nasceu em 1234, em Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Randal de Marbury, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Rebecca, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Idonea de Walton em 1259, em Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon de Marbury родился в 1234 г. в местности веобли, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Randal de Marbury было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Rebecca, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Idonea de Walton в 1259 г. в местности веобли, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon de Marbury nació en 1234, en Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Randal de Marbury, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Rebecca, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Idonea de Walton en 1259, en Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos.
